title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
